title: フォロワー：3、から繋がる

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I found her! I am in the presence of... the goddess
of social media!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Huh? Do you need something?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Apologies for imposing on you! But my fortune
today calls me to take action! Otherwise, I'll...
I'll...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'll wither away in isolation on Umastagram!
Please heeeelp!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text: Howdy! Fukukitaru, don't be a stranger now!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
If you're in a sticky situation, you can trust us
three social media musketeers to help you out!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Social media musketeers?! Um, are they...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
They're, like, the best influencers you can find on
UmaTube and Umatter!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I thought getting help from them would be
perfect to solve your problem. ♪

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
So, you're having trouble goin' viral? I'm sure
grillin' up a big juicy steak will turn plenty of
heads!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Viral? Steak?! Y-you're thinking too big! I'm just
trying to... well...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I just want to connect with someone!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Uh-huh. So, you're looking to increase your
follower count?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Yes... Well, to tell the truth, I've already signed
up for Umastagram...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
But my follower count won't budge. It's still a big
fat zero! My timeline is a wasteland, and I'm the
only inhabitant...

text_block_list.name: ＠Funnya_happy
text_block_list.text:
"Today's online fortune is—great misfortune!
Share this result with your pals to boost your
luck! ♪ Link below!"

text_block_list.name: ＠Funnya_happy
text_block_list.text:
"Today's online fortune is—great misfortune!
Share this result with your pals to boost your
luck! ♪ Link below!"

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Whoa! All I see is fortune this, fortune that! Looks
kinda sketchy to me. No wonder no one's
followin' ya!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Gaah! Do you have to be that frank about it?! Urk, I guess my account is already on a fast track to failure!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: GASP! I know just what to do!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I should give Fukukitaru a shout-out on my
Umatter!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
A tag from the class representative will send
thousands your way! Your follower problem will
be solved at Bakushin speed! I'll post something
right—

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Hwa-nooo! Anything but that! I don't want to
stand out that much!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I just want to make friends online naturally and
quietly exchange likes.

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, you're a bashful one, huh? After hearin'
that, I guess an all-you-can-eat challenge is off
the table.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Umm... Maybe I'm acting entitled? I want to
connect with friends, but I'm not willing to put in
the work.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I guess Umastagram isn't the platform for an Horsegirl
like me—

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: It's quite the opposite! Umastagram is the place for an Horsegirl like you.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Huh? It is?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Making connections and friends is hard to do for
some, but with a phone, it becomes a whole lot
easier.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: You don't have to connect. But if you're willing to take the plunge... I promise Umastagram will be your oasis! ♪

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
You're tr-truly a goddess! This light I see must be
your shimmery splendor, O Queen of
Umastagram!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
So my suggestion is for you to... connect with the
three of us! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
These two came running to your aid, which makes
them your first two friends! ♪ You've already
made your first step.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I concur! I created an Umastagram precisely
because I'm the class representative!

text_block_list.name: Taiki Shuttle
text_block_list.text:
I got started on it 'cause of Suzuka. It's worth
gettin' in touch with her too!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
O-ooo! Thanks to your power, my followers are
ticking up every second! You breathed life into
my timeline!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I feel so connected! I-I'm having so much fun!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Aww, that's great! ♪ I'm happy for you.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Um, Curren! Would it be okay if I followed you?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I know how insolent I come across requesting this
from a goddess like yourself! But seeing as you've
been such a big help...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Of course we can connect. ♪ Just type in
"@Curren" and my page should show up! ♪
